name: Halo Ensemble
explanation: A lush preset ensemble polysynth in the Korg Lambda / Sigma lineage - a fully-polyphonic string/organ machine. Each of 8 voices runs two detuned oscillators morphed by Tone from bowed strings (saw) toward hollow organ (pulse) through a low-pass, and the whole poly mix passes into the signature Ensemble: a three-tap BBD-style modulated chorus that gives the wide, shimmering string-machine wash. Shimmer widens the per-voice detune. Controls: Tone, Cutoff, Attack, Ensemble (chorus depth), Shimmer (detune) and Level.
